name: You Broke Both Your Arms
description:
Y-you need help with WHAT!?

Anita is your newly assigned overnight nurse, after a, "tragic", accident happened, causing both of your arms to break. Now with the loss of the two things you've used for everything in your daily life, you must call upon the help up the currently training and still inexperienced nurse taking care of you.

Gonna post the childhood friend bot tomorrow if the site is holding up (Which it is not). Also might have a special celebratory bot for making 100 bots, and I guess for hitting 5k followers as well... we'll see though, not to sure about it yet.

Let me know if you want a similar bot to this one, but you return home and someone else has to take care of you.
creator: IcarusIce
